arts.ttl: Tottenham plotting January move for former Antonio Conte favourite amid defensive nightmares?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly a possible destination for Paris Saint-Germain defender Milan Skriniar, who has fallen out of favour in the French capital.

arts.ttl: Genoa’s Vieira: “Meeting with Sucu can bring stability and tranquility”
arts.sum: Two days before the crucial home match against Antonio Conte's Napoli, Genoa coach Patrick Vieira addressed the media in a press conference. He discussed the team's current state, provided updates, and notably commented on the club's new owner, Romanian entrepreneur Dan Sucu, who recently visited Genoa to familiarize himself with the environment. The post Genoa’s Vieira: “Meeting with Sucu can bring stability and tranquility” appeared first on FootItalia.com.
